sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regex_data (id UInt32, data String);
INSERT INTO test_regex_data (id, data) VALUES (1, 'abc=111, def=222, ghi=333');
UPDATE test_regex_data SET data = 'x=1, y=2, z=3' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT extractAllGroupsHorizontal(data, '([x-z])=([0-9]+)') FROM test_regex_data WHERE id = 1;
